params.name: Postcard From Toad
params.source: Reward for killing [[Mailbox#Toad_Mercenary|Toad Mercenary]]'s second form
params.description: Before it was corrupted, Toad Mercenary often went around the world and made postcards to record different cultures. After it was banned from traveling freely, the postcards went out of print.
